description: A black van with a large metal ladder rack attached to the rear, parked on a city street.
A silver Toyota sedan parked on a street in front of a building, with a front grille and headlights visible.
A black SUV with a bicycle mounted on a rear hitch rack.
Bright yellow sedan taxi/ride-hailing car (Grab) on the road.
White Tesla Model Y electric SUV with distinctive blue wheels.
